original_statement: which team did the badgers play first this season?
mutated_statement: which group did that side do something with first this season?
mutation_analysis: 实体泛化/指代化 + 动作泛化: 特定队名“the badgers”被替换为模糊指代“that side” | 实体类别“team”被泛化为“group” | 动作“play”被泛化为“do something with” (the badgers→that side; team→group; play→do something with)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的文字（“The question asks which opponent the team faced first... Therefore, the first group (opponent) they played was Northern Iowa.”）以及iteration中simple_query返回Northern Iowa并标注1.0置信度，Agent直接将变异问题映射为明确的对手查询并给出具体答案。日志与评注中未出现任何关于问题模糊性、歧义或请求澄清的措辞，也未表现出不确定性或假设条件，因此Agent没有识别出原始变异中实体与动作的泛化/指代化，故归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
